checks.name: hard_operational_semantic_filter_applied
checks.description: All candidates screened against 7-criterion operational-semantic filter (3+ required)
checks.evidence: 6 candidates scored, all pass 3+ of 7. NetBox scores 6.5/7.

checks.name: rejection_criteria_enforced
checks.description: Candidates checked against explicit rejection criteria (framework-first, SDK-first, library-only, etc.)
checks.evidence: 11 repos eliminated: Airflow (too large), Dagster (too large), Sentry (too large/polyglot), Dispatch (archived), Prefect (framework-first), Paperless-ngx (GPL/insufficient domain), Ralph (insufficient PATH B), Kill Bill (Java), Meteroid (Rust), PyCasbin (library-only), django-helpdesk (too small)

checks.name: path_b_viability_checkpoint
checks.description: Surviving candidates checked for compiler, CSR, reconciliation, grounding, and SQO onboarding viability
checks.evidence: 5 candidates assessed. NetBox passes all 5 PATH B criteria. Ralph eliminated (insufficient). InvenTree marginal.

checks.name: scoring_matrix_complete
checks.description: 10-criterion scoring matrix applied with correct weight multipliers (CRITICAL = 2x)
checks.evidence: 5 candidates scored. Maximum 80. NetBox: 63, Nautobot: 50, AWX: 41, StackStorm: 40, InvenTree: 37.

checks.name: top_candidate_selected
checks.evidence: NetBox (63/80) selected as primary. Nautobot (50/80) selected as backup.

checks.name: flask_fastapi_insufficiency_explained
checks.description: Why Flask and FastAPI cannot serve as S2 candidates is documented
checks.evidence: See CANDIDATE_SCORING_MATRIX.md §5. Framework-first, no operational domain, fail hard filter (0/7).

checks.name: python_vs_language_neutral_separated
checks.description: Python-compatible candidates separated from future language-neutral candidates
checks.evidence: See CANDIDATE_SCORING_MATRIX.md §6. 5 Python-compatible scored. 4 future candidates noted (Kubernetes, Consul, GitLab, Backstage).

checks.name: narrative_transformation_justified
checks.description: Dedicated section explaining why top candidate proves PI matters
checks.evidence: See CANDIDATE_SCORING_MATRIX.md §7. Covers PATH A, PATH B, compiler, CSR, SQO, LENS, S1→S2 as coherent operational story.

checks.name: candidate_is_real_and_accessible
checks.description: Top candidate verified as real, accessible GitHub repo with permissive license
checks.evidence: netbox-community/netbox: 20,550 stars, Apache-2.0, last updated 2026-05-20, 1,156 Python files, Python/Django.

checks.name: candidate_not_in_rejection_set
checks.description: Top candidate does not match any explicit rejection criteria
checks.evidence: NetBox is an operational application (not framework/SDK/library), Python-primary (not generated-code-heavy), 193MB (not unbounded monolith), actively maintained (commits 2026-05-20), has rich operational domain.
